title: OP Chests
description: Chests and Trapped Chests drop OP Loot when broken!
body:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to another of my OP Loot datapacks! In this pack, breaking Chests and Trapped Chests drop OP Loot!

Leave the Pack Zipped In Your Datapack Folder! No Need To Type: /reload as this pack will auto load on it's own!
